schemes.name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
schemes.benefit: Rs 5000 maternity benefit in 3 installments for first child
schemes.eligibility: Pregnant and lactating mothers for first living child

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.benefit: Girl child welfare, education incentives, anti-dowry campaigns

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.benefit: High-interest savings account (7.6% p.a.) for girl child education/marriage
schemes.eligibility: Girl child below age 10 (parent/guardian opens it)

schemes.name: One Stop Centre (Sakhi) Scheme
schemes.benefit: Police, medical, legal, counselling support for violence victims
schemes.eligibility: Women affected by violence (any age, any background)
documents: No mandatory documents - emergency help available immediately

schemes.name: Swadhar Greh Scheme
schemes.benefit: Shelter, food, clothing, counselling for women in difficult circumstances
schemes.eligibility: Women in distress (trafficking victims, released prisoners, natural disaster victims)

schemes.name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (Women)
schemes.benefit: Zero-balance bank account, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30K life cover

schemes.name: National Crèche Scheme
schemes.benefit: Day care for children 6 months - 6 years while mother works

schemes.name: POSHAN Abhiyaan (Nutrition Mission)
schemes.benefit: Supplementary nutrition, ICDS services for children 0-6 and mothers

schemes.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra Scheme
schemes.benefit: Skill training, awareness, convergence services for rural women

schemes.name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
schemes.benefit: Safe, affordable hostel accommodation for working women
schemes.eligibility: Single working women with income < Rs 50K/month

schemes.name: Rashtriya Mahila Kosh Micro Finance
schemes.benefit: Low-interest micro-loans for SHG women entrepreneurs

schemes.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
schemes.benefit: Free nutrition, healthcare, pre-school education via Anganwadis

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection + first refill + regulator for BPL women
schemes.eligibility: BPL women who don't already have LPG connection

schemes.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar
schemes.benefit: National award + Rs 2 lakh for outstanding contribution to women's empowerment

schemes.name: STEP (Support to Training & Employment of Women)
schemes.benefit: Skill training and employment support in 9 traditional sectors
schemes.eligibility: Marginalized women in rural/urban areas aged 16+
